title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Awfis

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Awfis
jsonLd.description:
Awfis, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Awfis:
Awfis is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Awfis!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
